creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
I forgot to mention, that this diff fixes several other PRs:

- ports/144597: Kerberos knob work again
- ports/150493: Port updated to (almost) recent version
- ports/160389: Port build fine on FreeBSD 9.x
- ports/156926: Suffix isn't changed with knobs
- ports/155456: LPK knob work again

so when this diff will be commit, above PRs should be closed.
